normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem merge_sort_length_preserved (arr : List Int) : (mergeSort arr).length = arr.length
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The merge sort output has the same length as the input.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem merge_sort_sorted (arr : List Int) : Sorted (· ≤ ·) (mergeSort arr)
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The merge sort output is sorted in nondecreasing order.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem merge_sort_permutation (arr : List Int) : mergeSort arr ~ arr
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The merge sort output is a permutation of the input (same multiset).
